title: [SNC ADDON] Titan Variants
description: This addon adds additional Titan Shifter variants based on specific inheritors. Examples include Marcel’s Jaw Titan, Eren Kruger’s Attack Titan, and More, each with traits reflecting their respective users.
body:
# Information
This addon introduces additional Titan Shifter variants based on specific inheritors, expanding the variety of transformations available. The first release adds variants inspired by Marcel and Eren Kruger, each featuring unique head states, body decay stages, hardening and berserk abilities, custom ability icons, and dedicated bossbars to better reflect their individual traits.

Take a look:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2984e368a3a819c8e4d120734c3a441034e6dfd2.png)

# **Requirements**
Shingeki no Craft - 2.4+

[SNC ADDON] Shifter Form - Any (Optional)

# **Developers Note**
As of the beta version "Cadet Arlert" and moving forwards, this is addon is essentially 1 singular file. This means it would be used for the datapack & resource pack. 

# **Credits**

Allawie: Resource Pack Integration & Datapack Developer

Jinx: Texturing & Modeling
